news_items.headline: Yanks place Rodón on IL with elbow inflammation
news_items.summary: The Yankees placed lefty Carlos Rodón on the 15-day IL on Friday because of elbow inflammation.

news_items.headline: Reds' Greene to come off IL, start vs. Orioles
news_items.summary: The Cincinnati Reds plan to reinstate pitcher Hunter Greene from the 60-day injured list to make his season debut Saturday night against the Baltimore Orioles.

news_items.headline: Cubs recall Pomeranz from Triple-A, option Wicks
news_items.summary: The Cubs recalled left-hander Drew Pomeranz from Triple-A Iowa before Friday's game against the Cardinals and optioned lefty Jordan Wicks to the farm club.

news_items.headline: Cards reinstate Stanek, send Graceffo to Triple-A
news_items.summary: Cardinals reinstated right-hander Ryne Stanek from the paternity list ahead of Friday's game against the Cubs and optioned righty Gordon Graceffo to Triple-A Memphis.

news_items.headline: O's closer Helsley returns to IL with elbow issue
news_items.summary: Orioles closer Ryan Helsley went on the 15-day injured list Friday, two days after he felt discomfort in his right elbow while warming up in Wednesday's win over the White Sox.

news_items.headline: MLB hands Cavalli, Contreras 7-game suspensions
news_items.summary: Cade Cavalli and Willson Contreras each have been suspended seven games for their roles in a benches-clearing brawl at Fenway Park on Tuesday night. Miles Mikolas received a five-game suspension, and Red Sox outfielder Nate Eaton got a three-game ban.

news_items.headline: Yankees, Twins in rain delay on Friday night
news_items.summary: The weather has also gotten in the way of the Yankees ever winning again.

news_items.headline: Cardinals 17, Cubs 1: Hey, David Peterson! All you can do is laugh
news_items.summary: That was as ugly as Wednesday’s game was beautiful.

news_items.headline: Game Thread: Holy cow I’m glad this stadium is “indoors”
news_items.summary: Place an egg gently on the sidewalk in Houston and it’ll get hard boiled.

news_items.headline: How to watch San Francisco Giants vs. Colorado Rockies
news_items.summary: The Giants head to Coors Field tonight to begin a three-game series against the Rockies.

news_items.headline: Cubs become first team since 1894 to win and lose back-to-back games by at least 15 runs
news_items.summary: The Cubs won 23-3 on Wednesday and lost 17-1 on Friday.

news_items.headline: Astros vs Rays Game Discussion: 7/3/2026
news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: The Houston Astros (43-46) will welcome in the top team in the AL, the Tampa Bay Rays (51-33), for a three-game holiday weekend series at Daikin Park beginning tonight. RHP Spencer Arrighetti (7-4, 4.00 ERA) will get the Friday night start for the Astros opposite the veteran RHP Nick Martinez (7-2, 2.66 ERA) […]
